assertions.title: Pipeline persistence file is valid YAML
assertions.reason: `.bropilot/pipeline_state.yaml` parsed successfully as YAML and `step_statuses` includes step1-step8.

steps.expected: State file exists and shows step status structure
steps.observed: File exists and includes `step_statuses` with keys `step1` through `step8`.

steps.action: Parse YAML with linter/parser and verify step entries
steps.expected: YAML parses without error and all 8 steps have status entries
steps.observed: Ruby YAML parser loaded file successfully; all required step keys were present with non-null statuses.

frictions.description: Initial Python YAML validation attempt failed because `yaml` module was not installed in this environment.
frictions.resolution: Retried using Ruby's built-in YAML parser (`YAML.safe_load`) and completed validation successfully.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. Pipeline state file is valid YAML and includes status entries for all 8 steps.
